sql.query: SELECT id,workflowName,referenceCode,status,ownerTeamId,startDate,targetDate FROM tbl_workflows WHERE id=:id AND tenantId=:tenantId LIMIT 1

UPDATE tbl_workflows w SET w.workflowName=:workflowName,w.referenceCode=NULLIF(:referenceCode,''),w.status=:status,w.ownerTeamId=NULLIF(:ownerTeamId,''),w.locationId=(SELECT l.id FROM tbl_locations l WHERE l.id=NULLIF(:locationId,'') AND l.tenantId=w.tenantId LIMIT 1),w.spaceId=(SELECT s.id FROM tbl_spaces s WHERE s.id=NULLIF(:spaceId,'') AND s.locationId=NULLIF(:locationId2,'') AND s.tenantId=w.tenantId LIMIT 1),w.configurationId=(SELECT c.id FROM tbl_space_configurations c WHERE c.id=NULLIF(:configurationId,'') AND c.spaceId=NULLIF(:spaceId2,'') AND c.tenantId=w.tenantId LIMIT 1),w.startDate=NULLIF(:startDate,''),w.targetDate=NULLIF(:targetDate,''),w.completedDate=CASE WHEN :status2='complete' THEN COALESCE(w.completedDate,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP) ELSE NULL END,w.modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE w.id=:id AND w.tenantId=:tenantId

UPDATE tbl_workflow_field_values fv INNER JOIN tbl_workflows w ON w.id=fv.workflowId AND w.tenantId=fv.tenantId SET fv.valueDate=CASE WHEN fv.fieldKey='show_date' THEN NULLIF(:showDate,'') ELSE fv.valueDate END,fv.valueText=CASE WHEN fv.fieldKey='show_time' THEN NULLIF(:showTime,'') ELSE fv.valueText END,fv.modifiedDate=CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE fv.workflowId=:workflowId AND fv.tenantId=:tenantId AND fv.fieldKey IN ('show_date','show_time')

INSERT INTO tbl_activity_log (tenantId,userId,workflowId,entityType,entityId,actionType,summary,beforeJson,afterJson,createdDate) SELECT :tenantId,:userId,:workflowId,'workflow',:entityId,CASE WHEN :oldStatus<>:newStatus THEN 'workflow.status_changed' ELSE 'workflow.updated' END,CASE WHEN :oldStatus2<>:newStatus2 THEN CONCAT(:displayName,' changed ',:workflowName,' from ',REPLACE(:oldStatus3,'_',' '),' to ',REPLACE(:newStatus3,'_',' ')) ELSE CONCAT(:displayName,' updated ',:workflowName2) END,JSON_OBJECT('workflowName',:oldName,'referenceCode',:oldReference,'status',:oldStatus4,'ownerTeamId',:oldTeam,'startDate',:oldStart,'targetDate',:oldTarget),JSON_OBJECT('workflowName',:newName,'referenceCode',:newReference,'status',:newStatus4,'ownerTeamId',:newTeam,'startDate',:newStart,'targetDate',:newTarget),CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM tbl_activity_types at WHERE at.tenantId=:tenantId2 AND at.activityKey=CASE WHEN :oldStatus5<>:newStatus5 THEN 'workflow.status_changed' ELSE 'workflow.updated' END AND at.isActive=1 LIMIT 1
